name: Fingerprint Grow → Led Control
description: Turns on or off the LED on the reader. Only available on select models. If you have the R503 or R503-RGB use [`fingerprint_grow.aura_led_control` Action](https://esphome.io/components/fingerprint_grow#fingerprint_grow-aura_led_control) instead.

config_entries.label: State
config_entries.description: The state to set the LED.
